task_completion.description: Verify the input land cover raster is loaded into the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel shows 'landcover_classification' loaded as a raster layer.

task_completion.description: Verify the raster has been converted to a vector polygon layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new vector polygon layer appears in the layers panel, or the 'Polygonize (Raster to Vector)' tool dialog is visible and being executed.

task_completion.description: Verify the vector layer is filtered or selected to include only Forest features (DN=1).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter dialog, query builder, or 'Select by Expression' window showing a query like 'DN = 1' or 'DN' = 1, or an attribute table filtered to only show features with a value of 1.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 4 Forest features are present after filtering.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table shows exactly 4 rows, or the map canvas clearly displays exactly 4 distinct square polygons (located in the corners of the extent).

task_completion.description: Verify the filtered features are exported to the specified GeoJSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' or 'Export' dialog showing the format as GeoJSON and the file path as '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/forest_zones.geojson', or a success message confirming the export.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS software's graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show QGIS (or similar GIS software) interface being used with active dialogs, rather than just a terminal window running GDAL commands.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the GIS software rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog or progress bar in the GIS software is visible, rather than a text editor or terminal creating a mock .geojson file.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual filtering/selection rather than manually deleting features or faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of the 'Filter', 'Select by Expression', or 'Extract by Attribute' tools in the GIS software is visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input raster: /home/ga/GIS_Data/landcover_classification.tif. Expected output file: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/forest_zones.geojson. Target class value for Forest is 1. When correctly polygonized and filtered for DN=1, the resulting vector layer must contain exactly 4 distinct polygon features (located in the four corners of the raster).
